audit_items.proof_trace: Coset FFT operations are implemented in the external c-kzg-4844 C library (github.com/ethereum/c-kzg-4844/v2). Prysm only contains thin wrapper functions in beacon-chain/blockchain/kzg/kzg.go that delegate to ckzg4844.RecoverCellsAndKZGProofs() and related functions. Auditing the FFT implementation requires examining the external C library source code, which is maintained separately by the Ethereum Foundation.
